name: VAT Clause by Doc. Type Trans.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the language that is used when translating specified text on documents to foreign business partner, such as an item description on an order confirmation.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the translation of the VAT clause description. The translated version of the description is displayed as the VAT clause, based on the Language Code setting on the customer card.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the translation of the additional VAT clause description.
